summary: Shared shell and five UI primitives exist, compile cleanly, and provide the base contract used across all migrated pages.

checks.name: CHECK-01: AppLayout uses AppShell
checks.actual: AppLayout wraps content with AppShell and Container.

checks.name: CHECK-02: AppHeader provides identity, links, and toggle
checks.expected: Header identity, API links, and theme toggle
checks.actual: AppHeader includes app name, API quick links, and an ActionIcon-based color scheme toggle.

checks.name: CHECK-03: Primitive files exist
checks.command: test -f frontend/src/components/ui/PageSection.tsx && test -f frontend/src/components/ui/PageHeader.tsx && test -f frontend/src/components/ui/StatusBadge.tsx && test -f frontend/src/components/ui/ActionBar.tsx && test -f frontend/src/components/ui/KeyValueRow.tsx

checks.name: CHECK-04: StatusBadge uses shared color helper
checks.actual: StatusBadge normalizes input and uses the central theme/status helper.

checks.name: CHECK-05: Frontend build passes
checks.actual: Build succeeded after primitives were added and again at final verification.
